## BottomlessWater 3.4.6

License change — no code, config, or hook changes.

### Changed
- **License changed from MIT to GPL-3.0.** The plugin source is now licensed under
  the GNU General Public License v3.0. Versions up to 3.4.5 remain available under
  MIT (license changes are not retroactive); this and future versions are GPL-3.0.

### Install / update
Drop `BottomlessWater.cs` into `oxide/plugins/` and run `oxide.reload BottomlessWater`.
See `INSTALL.md`.
